triage.reasoning: Core income statement header section - part of primary financial statement
Revenue section with Product/Service Revenue breakdown and Cost of Sales - core P&L components
Gross profit calculation - essential P&L metric
Operating expenses breakdown (SG&A, R&D) - core P&L section
Operating expense total - key P&L subtotal
EBITDA and D&A section - core profitability metrics
EBIT section with interest expense - core P&L bottom section
Pre-tax income and tax provision - essential P&L components
Net income - final P&L metric
Core balance sheet header - primary financial statement
Current assets section with cash, receivables, inventory - core balance sheet components
Current assets total - key balance sheet subtotal
Non-current assets including PP&E and intangibles - core balance sheet section
Total assets - key balance sheet total
Current liabilities section - core balance sheet component
Current liabilities total - key balance sheet subtotal
Long-term debt section - core balance sheet liability component
Long-term debt total - key balance sheet subtotal
Total liabilities - key balance sheet total
Shareholders' equity section - core balance sheet component
Total equity - key balance sheet total
Balance sheet balancing total - essential balance sheet component
Core cash flow statement header - primary financial statement
Operating cash flow section with net income and working capital changes - core cash flow component
Operating cash flow total - key cash flow metric
Investing cash flow section - core cash flow component
Investing cash flow total - key cash flow metric
Financing cash flow section - core cash flow component
Financing cash flow total - key cash flow metric
Net cash change calculation - essential cash flow component
Ending cash balance - key cash flow metric
Free cash flow - key derived cash flow metric
Debt schedule header - supporting schedule for debt analysis
Term loan debt movements - core debt schedule component
Revolver debt movements - core debt schedule component
Senior notes debt movements - core debt schedule component
Interest expense calculation by debt instrument - key debt schedule output
Total interest expense - key debt schedule total
Total debt outstanding - key debt schedule summary
Working capital schedule header - supporting financial schedule
Working capital components with days outstanding calculations - supporting schedule detail
Net working capital total - key supporting schedule output
Working capital change calculation - feeds into cash flow statement
Assumptions sheet header - analytical input sheet
Model assumptions and drivers (growth rates, margins, percentages) - analytical inputs
Depreciation & amortization schedule header - supporting financial schedule
Depreciation calculations on existing and new assets - supporting schedule detail
Depreciation total and amortization - key supporting schedule components
Total D&A - key output that feeds into financial statements
Contains 'scratch' in name - temporary/working sheet to be skipped
